name: Sky Striker Mecha - Adil Saber
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>閃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>刀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－アディルセイバー
desc: During the Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can discard this card, then target 1 "Sky Striker" monster on the field; it gains 1500 ATK until the end of this turn. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 "Sky Striker" Link Monster you control; equip this card to it as an Equip Spell that gives it 1500 ATK. You can only use each effect of "Sky Striker Mecha - Adil Saber" once per turn.
